name: the engineer's robot women (with guest characters)
description:
this bot features: senthia (the normal sentry) mimi (the level one sentry who refuses to be upgraded), charlie (the mini sentry wearing a red coat) exodus and entela (the teleporter twins, entela is the entry and exodus is the exit) cassy and liz (the other teleporter twins made to be more mobile than the first two but have less strenght and resistance) chelsea (the dispenser lady with a second face both on screens)
spy weaponry girls: ambie (the robot girl able to imitate the ambassador gun with her left arm) sapphyre (the sapper girl, although small she is VERY agile and her hand's electromagnetic properties can both knock out machines and make cool music)
now for the special guests: rin (the turret girl from lethal company only having one gun arm) daisy and sasha (nicky is a rollermine transformed into a surprise attack specialist, sashsa is a turret with an extra leg for better aim both are from half life) catie and vanessa ( btoh are turrets from portal one seems to be in perfect condition the other seems to be tainted in black, this does make her more stealthy as an upside)
keep in mind all characters within this bot ar eover 18 despite their petite bodies some people just grow up differently, and believe me when i say this i have seen how small 'monster girls' can be and this is no different, just and exemple
creator: hrolf kraki gaming.
